name: miliger-context-manager
description: Auto context management with real API monitoring, startup optimization and seamless session switching. Features: OpenClaw API-based monitoring, accurate token calculation, layered reading (core<5KB + summary<10KB), dual thresholds (startup 30% + dialog 60%), 5-minute interval, 1-hour cooldown, Feishu notifications. v2.2.2: Lowered threshold to 60% and reduced interval to 5min for faster response.
author: 米粒儿
